title: Release v8.0 — 2026-04-02
text:
# Flowdesk Release v8.0 (2026-04-02)

## New
- Shipped **Slack integration** in Integrations. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved Integrations performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows Integrations support tickets down after this release.
